rounds.description: person kneeling and bowing down to the left, arms touching the ground
duck facing left, beak pointing up at an angle, flat bottom
flat bottom, straight vertical right edge, looks like a person sitting and facing left with an arm sticking out left

90-degree top-left corner formed by a flat horizontal top edge and straight vertical left edge. Looks like a blocky person sitting facing right with legs extended straight out horizontally to the right.
looks like a person running left: diamond head pointing up, sharp arm extending perfectly horizontally to the left, and a leg trailing diagonally down to the bottom-right
diamond head at top left. body angles down to the right, ending in two sharp points at the bottom right: one pointing straight down and one pointing perfectly horizontal to the right.

Diamond head at top left. Body's left edge is a long, straight diagonal going down-right. At the bottom right, there is a perfect 90-degree inward right-angle notch, creating two sharp tips: one pointing straight down with a vertical inner edge, and one pointing straight right with a horizontal inner edge.

Perfectly flat horizontal bottom edge. From this base, the left side extends into a long neck pointing diagonally up and left, and the right side ends in a sharp pointed tail pointing diagonally up and right. Looks like a swan or duck floating on water.

Entire left side is a single unbroken straight vertical line. Top edge is perfectly horizontal, creating a 90-degree top-left corner. In the LOWER half, a 'leg' extends completely horizontally to the right, with perfectly flat horizontal top and bottom edges and a flat vertical right tip.

Looks like a person bowing deeply to the left. The "head" is a diamond shape located at the very bottom-left, pointing diagonally down to the ground. The highest point is a sharp peak at the top, and the rightmost point is a sharp tip pointing horizontally right. The figure has no flat horizontal bottom edge.

Perfect 90-degree bottom-right corner formed by a completely flat horizontal bottom edge meeting a perfectly straight vertical right edge. It looks like a person sitting facing left, with a sharp triangular "arm" sticking straight out horizontally to the left, and a diamond-shaped "head" at the top.

Diamond head at the very top. Leftmost feature is a sharp 'arm' pointing straight out horizontally to the left, with a perfectly flat horizontal bottom edge. The top-right boundary is one long, straight diagonal edge sloping down to the far-right tip. The lowest point is a sharp tip pointing straight down. Has no perfectly vertical edges.

Diamond head at top-left. The entire bottom-left boundary is one single, unbroken straight diagonal line sloping down-right. At the bottom-right is a 90-degree inward L-shaped step: from the lowest point, the edge goes straight vertically UP, then turns perfectly horizontally RIGHT. This creates a sharp downward-pointing tip and a sharp right-pointing tip.

Swan-like figure facing left with a diamond head. Perfectly flat horizontal bottom base. To distinguish from similar figures: the neck leans diagonally up-left (it has NO perfectly vertical edges), and the tail points diagonally up-right. Crucially, the bottom base is the ONLY horizontal edge in the entire figure (it does not have a flat horizontal back or a flat-topped head).

Diamond head at the top. Left arm points left, and its bottom edge is a perfectly flat horizontal line. The ENTIRE right boundary is one unbroken straight diagonal line sloping down from the neck to the far-right tip. Crucially: the bottom has a sharp inverted-V notch between the lowest sharp foot and the far-right tip. The ONLY perfectly horizontal line in the entire figure is the bottom edge of the left arm (it has NO flat-bottomed feet).

Looks like a person bowing deeply to the LEFT. Crucially, the diamond 'head' is at the VERY BOTTOM-LEFT corner of the entire figure, pointing down to touch the ground. The highest point is a sharp peak pointing straight UP. The rightmost point is a sharp tip pointing horizontally RIGHT. It has NO flat horizontal bottom edge.

Perfect 90-degree bottom-right corner formed by a flat horizontal bottom edge meeting a perfectly straight vertical right edge. Looks like a person sitting facing left, with a diamond head at the top and a sharp triangular arm sticking straight horizontally to the left.

Perfect 90-degree top-left corner formed by a completely flat horizontal top edge meeting a single unbroken straight vertical left edge. In the lower half, a thick blocky 'leg' extends perfectly horizontally to the right, ending in a flat vertical tip.

Swan facing left. Perfectly flat horizontal bottom base. The entire left front edge slopes straight diagonally up-left to a diamond head. The right back edge slopes diagonally up-right to a sharp tail tip. The ENTIRE FIGURE has absolutely NO vertical edges, and the bottom base is its ONLY horizontal edge.

Diamond head at top-left. The entire bottom-left boundary is one single, unbroken straight diagonal line sloping down-right. At the bottom-right is a 90-degree inward L-shaped step: from the lowest point, the edge goes straight vertically UP, then turns perfectly horizontally RIGHT. This creates a sharp downward-pointing tip and a sharp right-pointing tip.

Perfect 90-degree bottom-right corner formed by a flat horizontal bottom edge meeting a perfectly straight vertical right edge. Looks like a person sitting facing left, with a diamond head at the top and a sharp triangular arm sticking straight horizontally to the left.

Looks like a person bowing deeply to the LEFT. Crucially, the diamond 'head' is at the VERY BOTTOM-LEFT corner of the entire figure, pointing down to touch the ground. The highest point is a sharp peak pointing straight UP. The rightmost point is a sharp tip pointing horizontally RIGHT. It has NO flat horizontal bottom edge.

Diamond head at the top. Left arm points left, and its bottom edge is a perfectly flat horizontal line. The ENTIRE right boundary is one unbroken straight diagonal line sloping down from the neck to the far-right tip. Crucially: the bottom has a sharp inverted-V notch between the lowest sharp foot and the far-right tip. The ONLY perfectly horizontal line in the entire figure is the bottom edge of the left arm.

Perfect 90-degree top-left corner formed by a completely flat horizontal top edge meeting a single unbroken straight vertical left edge. In the lower half, a thick blocky 'leg' extends perfectly horizontally to the right, ending in a flat vertical tip.

The ENTIRE left side is a single straight vertical line. Crucially, it has BOTH a completely flat horizontal TOP edge AND a completely flat horizontal BOTTOM edge, forming perfect 90-degree corners at both top-left and bottom-left. Looks like a blocky person sitting facing right: the bottom right is a thick rectangular leg ending in a vertical tip, and the middle right is a sharp triangular arm pointing right.

Person bowing deeply to the left. The diamond shape is at the VERY BOTTOM-LEFT, its lowest point touching the ground. The highest point is a sharp peak pointing straight UP. The rightmost point is a sharp tip pointing perfectly horizontally RIGHT. Crucially, to distinguish from similar figures: this rightmost tip is ELEVATED in the air (the right side does NOT touch the ground). The figure rests only on two sharp downward points located near the bottom-left.

Diamond head at top-left. The entire bottom-left boundary is one single, unbroken straight diagonal line sloping down-right. At the bottom-right is a 90-degree inward L-shaped step: from the lowest point, the edge goes straight vertically UP, then turns perfectly horizontally RIGHT. This creates a sharp downward-pointing tip and a sharp right-pointing tip.

Diamond head at the top. Left arm points left, and its bottom edge is a perfectly flat horizontal line. The ENTIRE right boundary is one unbroken straight diagonal line sloping down from the neck to the far-right tip. Crucially: the bottom has a sharp inverted-V notch between the lowest sharp downward-pointing foot and the far-right tip. The ONLY perfectly horizontal line in the entire figure is the bottom edge of the left arm.

Perfect 90-degree BOTTOM-RIGHT corner formed by a completely flat horizontal bottom edge meeting a perfectly straight vertical RIGHT edge. It looks like a person sitting facing LEFT, with a sharp triangular 'arm' sticking straight out horizontally to the LEFT, and a diamond-shaped 'head' at the top.

Swan facing left. Completely flat horizontal bottom base. The front-left boundary slopes diagonally up-left to a diamond head. The back-right boundary slopes diagonally up-right to a sharp tail tip. CRUCIALLY: it has ZERO perfectly vertical lines anywhere (no vertical front or back). The flat bottom is the ONLY horizontal line in the entire figure.

Diamond head at top-left. The entire bottom-left boundary is one single, unbroken straight diagonal line sloping down-right. At the bottom-right is a 90-degree inward L-shaped step: from the lowest point, the edge goes straight vertically UP, then turns perfectly horizontally RIGHT, creating a sharp downward-pointing tip and a sharp right-pointing tip.

Look for a figure with NO flat horizontal bottom edge (it balances entirely on sharp downward points). Crucially, its diamond shape is located at the VERY BOTTOM-LEFT, touching the floor. The absolute highest point is a sharp peak pointing straight UP (its left edge is perfectly straight and vertical). The extreme rightmost point is a sharp tip pointing straight RIGHT (its bottom edge is perfectly straight and horizontal).

Perfect 90-degree bottom-right corner formed by a completely flat horizontal bottom edge meeting a perfectly straight vertical right edge. It looks like a person sitting facing left, with a sharp triangular arm sticking straight out horizontally to the left, and a diamond-shaped head at the top.

Diamond head at the top. Left arm points left, and its bottom edge is a perfectly flat horizontal line. The ENTIRE right boundary is one unbroken straight diagonal line sloping down from the neck to the far-right tip. Crucially: the bottom has a sharp inverted-V notch between the lowest sharp foot and the far-right tip. The ONLY perfectly horizontal line in the entire figure is the bottom edge of the left arm (it has NO flat-bottomed feet).

Swan facing left. Perfectly flat horizontal bottom base. The neck slopes diagonally up-left to a diamond head. The back tail slopes diagonally up-right to a sharp tip. CRUCIALLY: it has ZERO perfectly vertical edges anywhere, and the flat bottom base is the ONLY horizontal line in the entire figure.

Entire left boundary is a single unbroken straight vertical line, forming perfect 90-degree corners at both top-left and bottom-left. CRUCIALLY to distinguish from similar figures: the top 'head' is a large triangle, NOT a square block. Its flat horizontal top edge ends in a SHARP POINT at the top-right, then the edge cuts diagonally DOWN-LEFT (inward) to a narrow neck. Middle-right is a sharp triangular arm pointing right. Bottom-right is a thick rectangular leg extending perfectly horizontally right, ending in a flat vertical tip.
